recipe.solutionCode:
from pathlib import Path
import base64
import runpy

_FILES = {
    'main.py': 'ZnJvbSBzZXJ2aWNlcy5zdG9yYWdlIGltcG9ydCBwYXJzZV90YXNrCgpmb3IgcmF3IGluIFsiYnVnfEZpeCBsb2dpbnxoaWdofG9wZW4iLCAiZmVhdHVyZXxFeHBvcnQgQ1NWfHJlcG9ydHN8ZG9uZSJdOgogICAgdGFzayA9IHBhcnNlX3Rhc2socmF3KQogICAgcHJpbnQodGFzay5sYWJlbCgpKQo=',
    'models/base_task.py': 'Y2xhc3MgQmFzZVRhc2s6CiAgICBkZWYgX19pbml0X18oc2VsZiwgdGl0bGUsIHN0YXR1cz0ib3BlbiIpOgogICAgICAgIHNlbGYudGl0bGUgPSB0aXRsZQogICAgICAgIHNlbGYuc3RhdHVzID0gc3RhdHVzCg==',
    'models/bug_task.py': '',
    'models/feature_task.py': '',
    'services/storage.py': '',
    'models/__init__.py': '',
    'services/__init__.py': '',
}

for _path, _data in _FILES.items():
    _file = Path(_path)
    _file.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    _file.write_text(base64.b64decode(_data).decode('utf-8'), encoding='utf-8')

runpy.run_path('main.py', run_name="__main__")
